changeSet.author: nexus-gmiaf.18
changeSet.comment: owners: tumbler-prefix tree, one row per owner namespace
changeSet.sql:
CREATE TABLE nexus.catalog_owners ( tenant_id TEXT NOT NULL, tumbler_prefix TEXT NOT NULL, name TEXT NOT NULL, owner_type TEXT NOT NULL, repo_hash TEXT, description TEXT, repo_root TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '', head_hash TEXT, CONSTRAINT catalog_owners_pk PRIMARY KEY (tenant_id, tumbler_prefix), CONSTRAINT catalog_owners_unique_name_type UNIQUE (tenant_id, name, owner_type) );
-- partial unique: same repo_hash cannot appear twice per tenant (TOCTOU guard) CREATE UNIQUE INDEX idx_catalog_owners_repo_hash ON nexus.catalog_owners (tenant_id, repo_hash) WHERE repo_hash IS NOT NULL AND repo_hash != '';
changeSet.rollback: DROP TABLE IF EXISTS nexus.catalog_owners CASCADE

changeSet.author: nexus-gmiaf.18
changeSet.comment: documents: tumbler-keyed catalog entries with FTS tsvector
changeSet.rollback: DROP TABLE IF EXISTS nexus.catalog_documents CASCADE

changeSet.author: nexus-gmiaf.18
changeSet.comment: links: typed directed graph edges between catalog entries
changeSet.rollback: DROP TABLE IF EXISTS nexus.catalog_links CASCADE

changeSet.author: nexus-gmiaf.18
changeSet.comment: document_chunks: ordered (doc_id, position) -> chash manifest (RDR-108 D2)
changeSet.rollback: DROP TABLE IF EXISTS nexus.catalog_document_chunks CASCADE

changeSet.author: nexus-gmiaf.18
changeSet.comment: collections: RDR-101 Phase 6 first-class collections projection
changeSet.rollback: DROP TABLE IF EXISTS nexus.catalog_collections CASCADE

changeSet.author: nexus-gmiaf.18
changeSet.comment: catalog_meta: key-value store for consistency markers, offsets, etc.
changeSet.rollback: DROP TABLE IF EXISTS nexus.catalog_meta CASCADE

changeSet.author: nexus-gmiaf.18
changeSet.comment: Enable and FORCE RLS; create tenant_isolation policy on all catalog tables

changeSet.author: nexus-gmiaf.18
changeSet.comment: Add next_seq to catalog_owners for atomic server-side tumbler assignment
changeSet.sql: ALTER TABLE nexus.catalog_owners ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS next_seq BIGINT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0;
changeSet.rollback: ALTER TABLE nexus.catalog_owners DROP COLUMN IF EXISTS next_seq

changeSet.author: nexus-gmiaf.18
changeSet.comment: Grant table privileges to nexus_svc role (idempotent)
